coreSource: Official RPG Maker MZ bundled corescript v1.8.0
method: Opened the isolated project in the official RPG Maker MZ editor using the official bundled 1.8.0 corescript, enabled HybridTileGraft followed by HybridTileGraftSmokeProbe, started a new game, observed the green PASS banner, and retained the source-bound save/reset/load, cleanup, frame-timing, and benchmark marker.
